items.title: Fix CSV upload timeout for enterprise imports
items.body: P1 customer escalation. Imports above 20MB time out after the proxy change. SLA expires tomorrow.

execution.definitionOfDone: Large CSV upload succeeds for Acme and Northstar with no timeout and customer ETA is sent.

items.title: Complete audit log story for payment settings
items.body: Sprint commitment. Required before compliance demo next week.

execution.definitionOfDone: Payment-setting changes emit audit events and appear in compliance export.

items.title: Refactor notification preferences component
items.body: Tech debt item from sprint backlog. No customer deadline.

execution.definitionOfDone: Component is split into smaller tested modules without behavior changes.
